title: Relieve progressive interface congestion on a hub-spoke uplink
trigger_signature: Monotonic if_util_pct slope + if_out_discards creep + latency/jitter drift on a hub uplink, below loss threshold.

actions.description: Collect interface and egress-queue statistics on the congested uplink.
actions.command_or_guidance: show interface eth1 | include rate|drops ; show policy-map interface eth1
actions.verification: Statistics returned; confirm utilisation slope and rising if_out_discards.

actions.description: Identify the top-talker flows driving the utilisation ramp from NetFlow.
actions.command_or_guidance: show flow monitor NETRA cache aggregate ipv4 source/destination sort counter bytes top 10
actions.verification: Top application classes / flows identified for the trailing 5 minutes.

actions.description: Raise QoS priority for the business/voice class on the congested interface to protect latency-sensitive traffic.
actions.command_or_guidance: napalm load_merge: policy-map QOS-UPLINK / class BUSINESS / priority percent 40
actions.rollback: napalm rollback to previous QOS-UPLINK policy-map
actions.verification: Business/voice latency holds while utilisation climbs; no business-class drops.

actions.description: Shift bulk/scavenger traffic to the alternate SD-WAN path to relieve the primary uplink.
actions.command_or_guidance: controller: set app-route policy BULK next-hop secondary-transport
actions.rollback: controller: revert BULK app-route policy to primary-transport
actions.verification: Primary uplink utilisation drops; alternate path remains within SLA.
